_comment: Sample session payload — exact schema sent to POST /complete-session. Passes all validation checks.

_session_rules.one_payload_per_session: Only one final payload allowed per session_id. Duplicates rejected with HTTP 409.
_session_rules.sent_on_completion: Payload is sent when the student finishes the chapter or explicitly ends the session.
_session_rules.retry_on_failure: Failed payloads stored in failed_payloads.json with same session_id for retry. No new session_id generated.

_validation_checks.no_fabricated_values: All values computed from actual interaction PASS
_validation_checks.null_not_zero_for_missing_kcs: kc3 and kc5 not attempted -> null (NaN), not 0 PASS

attempt_factor.rationale: Higher attempt penalty ensures first-try correctness is rewarded most

hint_factor.rationale: Using hints reduces score to discourage reliance on scaffolding

time_factor.rationale: Faster answers (within expected time) earn full time credit
